data.change_summary: Fixed both pending milestone-record amendments. Snapshot reconciliation now derives the idle non-terminal state from lineage history, so partial-failure repairs move stale `planning`/other non-terminal snapshots back to `ready` once a bead has finished. The bead-start path now goes through atomic filesystem adapter hooks that compare-and-insert task-run starts under the lineage lock and append `BeadStarted` events with locked `append_event_if_missing`, so concurrent retries of the same `(bead_id, project_id, run_id)` reuse one running row and emit one start event. Added shared task-run matching helpers plus regression tests for stale-planning completion repair and concurrent start idempotence.
outstanding_risks: Milestone start and completion still span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction; retries now repair drift, but a crash between file writes can still leave snapshot or journal state temporarily behind `task-runs.ndjson` until the same operation is replayed.

steps.description: Updated milestone task-run reconciliation to derive active/idle snapshot state from canonical lineage attempts, promoting stale non-terminal idle snapshots to `ready` once attempt history exists and no bead remains active.

Extended the service and filesystem ports with atomic start/idempotence hooks, then implemented locked task-run start reuse/backfill and locked journal `append_event_if_missing` so concurrent identical starts collapse to one lineage row and one journal event.
Added regression coverage for stale-planning completion repair and concurrent start retries, then reran formatting, milestone_record unit tests, and clippy.
